calendar.matters:
Petitioner Denise Thomas Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; Petition For Order For Accounting Removal, And Injunctive Relief; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Lowell Thomas (Trustee). Denise Thomas in Pro Per.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court directed the Parties to meet outside and try to work things out. Upon returning, Mr. Melbostad stated that they had agreed that Lowell Thomas would distribute $50,542.85 to Denise Thomas, Cynthia Keeling, and Rita Rylander by August 22, 2008 in the form of a cashiers check. Distibution in the amount of $50,542.85 minus the burial expenses are to be distributed to the Successors in interest of Leroy Thomas by that same date. Lowell Thomas is to provide proof of establishment of the Washington Mutual account to Leaonard Henderson. Mr. Henderson will instruct Lowell Thomas as to who he wants to appoint as Trustee. Contigent upon compliance of this agreement/order, Denise Thomas' petition will be denied.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Settlement Out Of Court
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Off Calendar

Petitioner Denise Thomas Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; Petition For Order For Accounting Removal, And Injunctive Relief; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Settlement Out Of Court
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Settlement Out Of Court
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Continued To Jul-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Relief From Breach Od Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Lowell Thomas. Denise Thomas in Pro Per.

Mr. Melbostad stated that he looked into the estate planning document, that he advised the client that there was no basis to not distribute the residue to the siblings and that he would like an order from the Court to distribute equally. Ms. Thomas stated that there was no proof of the taxes being paid and that she was willing to settle out of court. Mr. Melbostad stated that he may or may not file a petition for instructions. Mr. Melbostad will submit the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Relief From Breach Od Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Continued To Apr-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- DENISE THOMAS, PETITIONER IN PRO PER;
ATTY. PAUL MELBOSTAD FOR SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE LOWELL PAUL THOMAS

THE COURT INQUIRED WHETHER SHE HAS SEEN THE EXAMINER'S NOTE AND WHY THERE WAS NO RESPONSE FROM MISS THOMAS. MISS THOMAS INFORMED THE COURT THAT SHE THOUGHT THE HEARING WAS POSTPONED.
MR. MELBOSTAD REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT HE INFORMED MISS THOMAS THAT THE HEARING WAS BEING CONTINUED AND FURTHER TOLD THE COURT THAT MS. THOMAS INDICATED IF SHE GET HER DISTRIBUTION SHE WOULD NOT PROCEED WITH HER OBJECTIONS. MS. THOMAS ALSO INFORMED THE COURT THAT HER NEPHEW SIGNED A WAIVER BUT STILL IS STILL WAITING FOR THE MONEY. A PETITION FOR INSTRUCTION WILL BE FILED WITH THE COURT AS SOON AS ATTY. MELBOSTAD GET THE NECESSARY DOCUMENTS HE IS WAITING FOR. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO APRIL 22, 2008. JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT/SAJJA RAVINANTAPRICHA REPORTER: KATH BERSAMIN, CSR # 11722
